attacking_style: Late-climb punchy accelerations in final kilometer, primarily targeting GC time gaps and jerseys rather than stage wins. Struggles to sustain long-range efforts, showing tendency to crack when forced to go early or manage breakaway pace.
team_tactics: Benefits from teammate setups on final climbs but shows vulnerability when teammates become GC threats (Landa dynamic). Often operates within protective group rather than leading attacks independently, revealing deference hierarchy that limits offensive options.
terrain_preference: High-altitude steady-tempo climbs above 2000m where sustained power suits him. Exposed badly on explosive steep gradients (Los Machucos pattern) and technical finishes requiring punchy accelerations or sprint recoveries.
vulnerability: Explosive steep finishes destroy him; time trials reveal accumulated fatigue; mismanages effort distribution when committing early to breakaways; tactical naivety in race situations (nature break timing); completely collapses under sustained high-tempo pressure from super-teams.
key_patterns: Final-kilometer attacks specifically targeting jersey reclaim and podium gaps, not stage victories (4 instances).
Cracks badly on steep explosive gradients; superior on steady tempo climbs above 2000m (3 instances).
Time trials expose accumulated fatigue and altitude effects, consistent weakness pattern (2+ instances).
Early breakaway commitments lead to faded finishes showing poor effort distribution management (2 instances).
Team hierarchy conflicts when Landa became GC threat limited offensive coordination (2 Giro instances).
Complete collapse under sustained super-team tempo pressure, including mid-stage abandonment (Ineos 2021 pattern).
form_trajectory: negative: 2021 showed complete collapse under Ineos pressure with mid-stage abandon; 2022 reduced to opportunistic bonus second hunting rather than leading GC contention.
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 14
2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 20
2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 14
